canonVectors.name: string-with-other-control
canonVectors.description: string with a non-mnemonic control char (U+0001)

canonVectors.name: string-non-ascii-passthrough
canonVectors.description: non-ASCII passes through as UTF-8 bytes (no \u escapes)

canonVectors.name: object-key-sort
canonVectors.description: object keys sorted lexicographically by UTF-16 code unit

canonVectors.name: key-with-special-chars
canonVectors.description: object key containing characters that need escaping

envelopeVectors.name: minimal-claim
envelopeVectors.description: A claim with only required fields, no optional features.

envelopeVectors.name: claim-with-scene-tree
envelopeVectors.description: A claim with scene tree root populated. Per-leaf hashes are NOT in the committed claim post-refactor — they live in the opt-in comparison disclosure bundle (Section 06).

envelopeVectors.name: claim-with-preferences
envelopeVectors.description: A claim with user preferences populated.

envelopeVectors.name: claim-with-extensions
envelopeVectors.description: A claim with non-empty claimExtensions — forward-compatibility.

envelopeVectors.name: claim-full
envelopeVectors.description: A claim with every optional field populated: scene tree, paragraph tree, preferences, extensions, AND a signed registrant block from the frozen test-corpus Ed25519 key (deterministic signature per RFC 8032).

envelopeVectors.name: claim-with-paragraph-tree-only
envelopeVectors.description: A claim with ONLY the paragraph tree populated (no scene tree). Demonstrates the paragraph layer is independently committable for short-form work where scene segmentation is not meaningful.

envelopeVectors.name: claim-with-revision-pointer
envelopeVectors.description: A claim pointing to a previous registration (revision lineage / amendment chain).

envelopeVectors.name: minimal-envelope
envelopeVectors.description: A full envelope wrapping the minimal claim, no proofs.

envelopeVectors.name: envelope-with-ots-proof
envelopeVectors.description: A full envelope with one OpenTimestamps proof entry.

envelopeVectors.name: envelope-with-multiple-proofs
envelopeVectors.description: A full envelope with multiple proofs (forward-compat test: same claim, multiple anchors).
